title.en: IMAGE OR VIDEO RECOGNITION OR UNDERSTANDING
Arrangements for image or video recognition or understanding (character recognition in images or video G06V30/10)
Image acquisition (document image scanning and transmission H04N1/00; control of digital cameras H04N23/60)
Image preprocessing
Extraction of image or video features
using pattern recognition or machine learning (optical pattern recognition or electronic computations therefor G06V10/88)
Image or video recognition using optical means, e.g. reference filters, holographic masks, frequency domain filters or spatial domain filters
Hardware or software architectures specially adapted for image or video understanding
Management of image or video recognition tasks
Detection or correction of errors, e.g. by rescanning the pattern or by human intervention; Evaluation of the quality of the acquired patterns
Scenes; Scene-specific elements (control of digital cameras H04N23/60)
Underwater scenes
Terrestrial scenes (scenes under surveillance with static cameras G06V20/52; scenes perceived from the exterior of a vehicle G06V20/56; scenes perceived from the interior of a vehicle G06V20/59)
in augmented reality scenes
in albums, collections or shared content, e.g. social network photos or video
{Categorising the entire scene, e.g. birthday party or wedding scene}

in video content (extracting overlay text G06V20/62; video retrieval G06F16/70; processing of video elementary streams in video servers H04N21/234; processing of video elementary streams in video clients H04N21/44)
Context or environment of the image
Type of objects
Labelling scene content, e.g. deriving syntactic or semantic representations
Recognising image objects characterised by unique random patterns
Identifying an image sensor based on its output data
{Pattern authentication; Markers therefor; Forgery detection}
Character recognition; Recognising digital ink; Document-oriented image-based pattern recognition (scanning, transmission or reproduction of documents or the like H04N1/00)
Character recognition
Document-oriented image-based pattern recognition
Recognition of biometric, human-related or animal-related patterns in image or video data
Human or animal bodies, e.g. vehicle occupants or pedestrians; Body parts, e.g. hands
Movements or behaviour, e.g. gesture recognition (recognition of facial expressions G06V40/16)
Writer recognition; Reading and verifying signatures
Spoof detection, e.g. liveness detection
Maintenance of biometric data or enrolment thereof
Static or dynamic means for assisting the user to position a body part for biometric acquisition
Multimodal biometrics, e.g. combining information from different biometric modalities
Indexing scheme relating to image or video recognition or understanding
Solutions for problems related to non-uniform document background
Recognising information on displays, dials, clocks
Recognition of patterns in medical or anatomical images
Recognition of patterns in DNA microarrays
Recognition of patterns representing particular kinds of hidden objects, e.g. weapons, explosives, drugs
Recognition of objects for industrial automation
Target detection
Detecting or categorising vehicles
Recognition of logos
Recognition assisted with metadata
Technique with transformation invariance effect
Acquisition of 3D measurements of objects
Type of disclosure document
